name: Elven Mint
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance by 100%. Also autoclick 3 times per second.

name: Sylvan Treasure Frills
effect: 50% of your total building production is added to base clicking reward.

name: Ancient Clicking Arts
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: +(0.75 * ln(1+x)^1.5), where x = clicks this Reincarnation

name: Elven Emissary
effect: Increase clicking reward based on Good buildings built. Also increase Offline gains of Faction Coins by 200%.
formula: (1.4 * x^0.6)%, where x = Good buildings built

name: Elven Efficiency
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(1.75 * ln(1+x)^1.75)%, where x = FC found this Era

name: Secret Clicking Techniques
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = clicks this Reincarnation

name: Elven Diplomacy
effect: Clicks count more based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: (1.5 * ln(1+x)^1.15)%, where x = FC found this Era

name: Elven Luck
effect: Each click has a 1% chance to gain coins equal to 150,000% of production, also generating Faction Coins based on Reincarnations made. Assistants trigger once per second.

name: Elven Treasure Casing
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on trophies unlocked.

name: Wooden Dice
effect: Increase Elven Luck chance for autoclicks and increase its effects based on the highest amount of Arboreal Cities built this Reincarnation.
formula: Production: (80 * x^0.8)%, where x = highest Arboreal Cities this Reincarnation

name: Camouflage
effect: Assistants and Clicks count 1,000% more for all purposes. Increase assistant production based on assistants owned.

name: Elven Discipline
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: Additive: +(150 * ln(1+x)^1.5); Mult: (1.5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%; where x = FC found this Era
